title: Chromolaena latisquamulosa
taxonomy: Chromolaena latisquamulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and belongs to the genus Chromolaena. The plant is further classified as a member of the tribe Senecioneae, which comprises various dandelion-like plants. Chromolaena latisquamulosa is a shrubby perennial herb with a distinctive leaf structure and bright purple flowers. Its classification as a member of the Asteraceae family places it within the larger group of composite flowers.
